[{'text': "Interesting! Now both front_left AND back_left show 1.77m - this suggests there's a wall/obstacle to the left (north) at about 1.77m. I'm at (10.10, 7.87). The destination is at (11.51, 13.67). 

Looking at the map, I can see the robot is in the middle corridor and the destination is in the upper corridor. I need to find a gap to go north. The front_left reading suggests the wall to the north is about 1.77m away. Let me try rotating left (north) to check if there's a passage.

Let me first rotate 90° left (CCW) to face north and check the LiDAR.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_019RrjRD2SyccqjXjx6JQ3eS', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': 90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
